overview: HAR Vision is a Human Activity Recognition system that analyzes video to automatically detect and classify human activities like walking, clapping, jumping, and more. Upload a video or use your webcam for real-time detection with confidence scores and visual timelines.
features: 5-step animated analysis pipeline (frame extraction, CNN, pose estimation, temporal analysis, classification)
Activity results with confidence score bars and color-coded timeline
Live webcam detection with real-time activity recognition
How It Works explainer and use case cards
Dataset Reference section for 10 HAR benchmark datasets
